title: 03.23.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: March 23, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for March 13, 2026 through March 19, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly activity reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of March 13–19, 2026. The reports cover public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail individual requestors, request types, and categories across police, fire, and general public records.
fields.key_stats: The public records request log (run date 03/20/2026) spans at least 14 pages and includes dozens of requests filed on March 13–14, 2026 alone, covering categories such as police reports, background requests, body worn camera video, fire investigation reports, building permits, 911 dispatch records, traffic accidents, and environmental site assessments.
fields.action_items: Mayor and City Council to review three attached reports: (A) public records requests from City Clerk's Office, (B) weekly media requests from Strategic Communications, and (C) weekly code enforcement service requests from Code Enforcement.
